reviews.review_text: Seller was transparent with service history and answered all direct questions truthfully; minor interior wear was not disclosed but also not asked about.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit

reviews.review_text: Seller actively misrepresented the vehicle's maintenance history, claiming a 'clean bill of health' despite a significantly overdue transmission service, and failed to disclose body damage.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent on passenger rear fender with minor paint cracking, not visible in listing photos
Transmission fluid service overdue by 18,000 miles; last changed at 61,000 instead of recommended 45,000-mile intervals

reviews.review_text: Despite direct questions, the seller concealed a significant accident and downplayed an oil leak, resulting in a misleading purchase.
revealed_facts: Moderate front-end collision in 2019 with $7,200 in repairs through insurance; airbags did not deploy but bumper, hood, and radiator support were replaced
Valve cover gasket seeping oil onto exhaust manifold, causing occasional burning smell after spirited driving; repair quoted at $850
Driver seat bolster leather cracked and foam showing through; passenger side beginning to crack as well
